articles.title: Jayson Tatum and Brad Stevens appear on Rich Paul’s big board of LeBron James landing spots
articles.description:
Tatum and Stevens weren't one of the biggest landing spots for James, but they got some recognition from Paul.

The post Jayson Tatum and Brad Stevens appear on Rich Paul’s big board of LeBron James landing spots appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum and Brad Stevens recognized as potential LeBron James landing spots.
Rich Paul includes Boston in his list, though not a top choice.
Boston Celtics fans may see increased excitement around future roster changes.

articles.title: Robert Parish not a fan of Celtics’ decision to trade Jaylen Brown: ‘If Red [Auerbach] was alive … I think this would have made him nauseated’
articles.description:
The Celtics legend had said he was put off by the trade rumors swirling around Brown before he was eventually dealt.

The post Robert Parish not a fan of Celtics’ decision to trade Jaylen Brown: ‘If Red [Auerbach] was alive … I think this would have made him nauseated’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics legend Robert Parish criticized the trade of Jaylen Brown, expressing disappointment.
Parish believes the trade would have upset former coach Red Auerbach.
Local fans may feel disillusioned by the Celtics' decision to trade a key player.

articles.title: Jayson Tatum bids farewell to Jaylen Brown: ‘Nothing but love and respect for you’
articles.description:
“Forever grateful for all that we accomplished together, for pushing me to be a better player.”

The post Jayson Tatum bids farewell to Jaylen Brown: ‘Nothing but love and respect for you’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum publicly thanked Jaylen Brown for their time together on July 3, 2026.
Tatum expressed gratitude for their accomplishments and Brown's influence on his development.
Brown's departure may impact team dynamics and fan sentiment in Boston.
